revision.comment: Bot: one‑shot full reformat/process [[Template:Keep local high-risk/doc]]
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude>
{{Draft categories|
[[Category:templates with draft categories]]
[[Category:Pages without meta categories]]
}}

<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
[[Category:Pages without meta categories]]
}}</noinclude>

{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be protected or undeleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]].

revision.comment: Adding a "See also" link to [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]].
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be protected or undeleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]

{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or undeleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]

revision.comment: heh, how did I do that?
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]

{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
=== User=== @Canhbui10 * {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Canhbui10]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]

{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
To exclude the {{tl|keep local}} message, set the parameter {{para|keeplocal}} to "no".
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]

{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
To exclude the {{tl|keep local}} message, set the parameter {{para|keeplocal}} to "no".
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]u

{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
To exclude the {{tl|keep local}} message, set the parameter {{para|keeplocal}} to "no".p
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]u

revision.comment: Reverted 2 edits by [[Special:Contributions/92.20.230.93|92.20.230.93]] ([[User talk:92.20.230.93|talk]]): Rv stray letters
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
To exclude the {{tl|keep local}} message, set the parameter {{para|keeplocal}} to "no".
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]

{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
To exclude the {{tl|keep local}} message, set the parameter {{para|keeplocal}} to "th e
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]

{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
To exclude the {{tl|keep local}} message, set the parameter {{para|keeplocal}} to "no".

revision.comment: Add Template:uncategorized. All templates should be in at least one category.
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
To exclude the {{tl|keep local}} message, set the parameter {{para|keeplocal}} to "no".
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line --> {{Uncat}} }}</includeonly>

{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
To exclude the {{tl|keep local}} message, set the parameter {{para|keeplocal}} to "no".
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line --> [[Category:Wikipedia administration templates]] }}</includeonly>

{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
To exclude the {{tl|keep local}} message, set the parameter {{para|keeplocal}} to "no".
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line --> [[Category:Wikipedia administration templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
To exclude the {{tl|keep local}} message, set the parameter {{para|keeplocal}} to "no".
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
To exclude the {{tl|keep local}} message, set the parameter {{para|keeplocal}} to "no".
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
To exclude the {{tl|keep local}} message, set the parameter {{para|keeplocal}} to "no".
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories and interwikis go at the bottom of this page. -->
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
To exclude the {{tl|keep local}} message, set the parameter {{para|keeplocal}} to "no".
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line -->
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia administration templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{documentation subpage}}
This template is to be used on images on Commons that are locally uploaded and protected for being high-risk, to warn unaware admins that the image should not be unprotected or deleted.
The reason for protection should be specified using {{para|reason}}. If the image on Commons is under a different name for some reason, that may be specified using {{para|image}}.
To exclude the {{tl|keep local}} message, set the parameter {{para|keeplocal}} to "no".
=== See also ===
* {{tl|check file on delete}} – Used in the interface to display a warning on [[Special:Delete]]. * [[Wikipedia talk:Cascade-protected items#About high-risk images]]
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia administration templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
